title: Diffusion Models explained..
summary: Educational video explaining how diffusion models work as a process and framework. Covers the progression, strengths, weaknesses, and implementation details including Diffusion Transformers (DiT). Discusses data efficiency, history, and theory underlying diffusion-based generative modeling.
